items.title: Google Released Gemma 4 with a Focus On Local-First, On-Device AI Inference
items.summaryShort: Google Released Gemma 4 with a Focus On Local-First, On-Device AI Inference. With the release of Gemma 4, Google aims to enable local, agentic AI for Android development through a family of models designed to support the entire software lif

items.title: Lyft Scales Global Localization Using AI and Human-in-the-Loop Review
items.summaryShort: Lyft Scales Global Localization Using AI and Human-in-the-Loop Review. Lyft has implemented an AI-driven localization system to accelerate translations of its app and web content.

items.title: Presentation: Reimagining Platform Engagement with Graph Neural Networks
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Reimagining Platform Engagement with Graph Neural Networks. Mariia Bulycheva discusses the transition from classic deep learning to GNNs for Zalando's landing page.

items.title: Article: The Spring Team on Spring Framework 7 and Spring Boot 4
items.summaryShort: Article: The Spring Team on Spring Framework 7 and Spring Boot 4. InfoQ recently spoke with key members of the Spring team about the significant architectural and functional advancements in Spring Framework 7 and Spring Boot 4.

items.title: Podcast: How SBOMs and Engineering Discipline Can Help You Avoid Trivy’s Compromise
items.summaryShort: Podcast: How SBOMs and Engineering Discipline Can Help You Avoid Trivy’s Compromise. Viktor Peterson, part of the CISA task force working on SBOM blueprints and co-founder of sbomify, explores the shifting landscape of software supply chain

items.title: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility
items.summaryShort: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility. Though Amazon has faced issues with warehouse safety, the company said that the death was not work related.

items.title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
items.summaryShort: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro. The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

items.title: Uber and Nuro begin testing premium robotaxi service in San Francisco
items.summaryShort: Uber and Nuro begin testing premium robotaxi service in San Francisco. Uber employees can now hail a Lucid robotaxi as part of the testing.
